title: "The AI Scientist: Towards Fully Automated Open-Ended Scientific Discovery"
column13: "The paper presents the first comprehensive framework for fully automatic scientific discovery
column14: enabling frontier large language models (LLMs) to perform research independently
column17: and communicate their findings in a full scientific paper."

title: "SCIAGENTS: Automating Scientific Discovery Through Multi-Agent Intelligent Graph Reasoning"
column10: an approach that leverages large-scale ontological knowledge graphs
column12: and multi-agent systems to automate scientific discovery and reveal hidden interdisciplinary relationships."

title: "PaperQA: Retrieval-Augmented Generative Agent for Scientific Research"
column14: a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) agent for answering questions over the scientific literature that performs information retrieval across full-text articles and assesses the relevance of sources."

title: "ChemCrow: Augmenting large-language models with chemistry tools"
column12: an LLM chemistry agent designed to accomplish tasks across organic synthesis
column14: and materials design by integrating 13 expert-designed tools."

title: "Toolformer: Language Models Can Teach Themselves to Use Tools"
column16: a model trained in a self-supervised way to decide which APIs to call
column19: and how to best incorporate the results into future token prediction."

title: "ReAct: Synergizing Reasoning and Acting in Language Models"
column14: "The paper explores the use of LLMs to generate both reasoning traces and task-specific actions in an interleaved manner
column15: demonstrating greater synergy between the two on diverse decision-making and language tasks."

title: "Reflexion: Language Agents with Verbal Reinforcement Learning"
column14: a framework to reinforce language agents through linguistic feedback
column15: where agents verbally reflect on task feedback signals and maintain reflective text in an episodic memory buffer."

title: "MLGYM: A New Framework and Benchmark for Advancing AI Research Agents"
column24: "The paper introduces a framework and benchmark containing 13 diverse AI research tasks to evaluate and develop LLM agents on reinforcement learning and other machine learning problem-solving skills."

title: "Galactica: A Large Language Model for Science"
column17: a large language model trained on a massive scientific corpus that can store
column20: outperforming existing models on scientific tasks."

title: "BioGPT: Generative Pre-trained Transformer for Biomedical Text Generation and Mining"
column15: a domain-specific generative Transformer language model pre-trained on large scale biomedical literature
column16: outperforming previous models on several biomedical NLP tasks."
